task_completion.description: The agent initiated the creation of a new Permanent Agent node named 'frontend-builder-01'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins 'New Node' screen is visible with 'frontend-builder-01' entered in the node name field and the 'Permanent Agent' radio button selected, or the subsequent configuration page for 'frontend-builder-01' is open.

task_completion.description: The remote root directory and number of executors are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the node configuration page, the 'Remote root directory' input field contains exactly '/opt/jenkins-agent' and the 'Number of executors' input field contains '4'.

task_completion.description: The labels and usage mode are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the node configuration page, the 'Labels' input field contains 'frontend linux high-mem' and the 'Usage' dropdown is set to 'Only build jobs with label expressions matching this node'.

task_completion.description: The launch method is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the node configuration page, the 'Launch method' dropdown is set to 'Launch agent by connecting it to the controller'.

task_completion.description: The new node is saved and appears in the Jenkins nodes list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins 'Nodes' or 'Manage nodes and clouds' dashboard is visible, showing a table of nodes that includes 'frontend-builder-01', indicating the configuration was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jenkins web GUI to create the node.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jenkins web interface in a browser, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered the values into the actual Jenkins configuration fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values should be visible inside the proper HTML input fields and dropdowns of the Jenkins node configuration page, not typed into a text editor or note-taking app.

integrity.description: The agent did not use shortcuts to bypass the UI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step navigation and form filling in the Jenkins UI, rather than magically appearing at the final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a Jenkins Permanent Agent node with the following exact configuration: Name: 'frontend-builder-01', Number of executors: 4, Remote root directory: '/opt/jenkins-agent', Labels: 'frontend linux high-mem', Usage: 'Only build jobs with label expressions matching this node' (EXCLUSIVE mode), Launch method: 'Launch agent by connecting it to the controller' (JNLPLauncher).
